images.alt: Spacious luxury apartment balcony terrace featuring contemporary outdoor wicker seating and a sunken hot tub jacuzzi, looking out towards the cityscape
Comfortable outdoor rattan sofas and armchairs arranged around a glass coffee table under warm lighting
Premium wooden decking surrounding a clean white hot tub jacuzzi set against a grey tiled wall
Modern villa bedroom featuring a cozy double bed with white linens, wooden floors, wardrobe, and a arched full-length mirror
High-angle view of a modern multi-story apartment complex building structure under a sunny sky
Living room

Where you'll be
Candolim, Goa, India
+
−
Exact location will be provided after booking.
Neighbourhood highlights

Located in the heart of Candolim, Amor de Goa offers a peaceful stay with easy access to beaches, cafés and popular attractions.

The neighbourhood is vibrant yet peaceful. Candolim beach is just a short walk away, offering water sports, shacks, and beautiful sunsets. You will find some of Goa's best restaurants, bars, and boutique stores within a 5-minute radius. Despite being close to the action, the property is situated in a quiet lane surrounded by lush greenery, giving you the best of both worlds.

Show more
